channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1010)—Answers for Tuesday, March 17
item.content:encoded:
How has your week started? I apologise, I missed Monday’s NYT Connections hints – I hope you can forgive me! I’ll make up for it today with the best spin around Tuesday’s NYT Connections solutions you could ever want. With this guide, you’ll breeze through today’s challenge and emerge victorious in a matter of seconds.

Scroll down to secure the answers you need for today’s NYT Connections puzzle!

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (March 17)

Here are the words from today’s NYT Connections puzzle:

  • KITE
  • WIND
  • HOT WATER
  • KEY
  • TEA BAG
  • LIGHTNING
  • BALLOON
  • JAM
  • PITCH
  • ARROW
  • BIND
  • SCALE
  • YO-YO
  • TONE
  • ROCKET
  • PICKLE

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – Words you might associate with being stuck
  • Green – Words you might use when composing music
  • Blue – Words you might associate with things going up and down
  • Purple – Words you’d associate with things going fast

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, March 17:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, March 17 (#1010)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – BIND, HOT WATER, JAM, PICKLE
  • Green – KEY, PITCH, SCALE, TONE
  • Blue – BALLOON, KITE, TEA BAG, YO-YO
  • Purple – ARROW, LIGHTNING, ROCKET, WIND

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-connections-hints-solutions-march-17-1010/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cyberpunk 2077 PS5 Pro Enhanced Update Coming Soon
item.content:encoded:
CD Projekt Red has announced that Cyberpunk 2077 will receive a free PS5 Pro Enhanced update soon.

Since the release of the PS5 Pro in November 2024, many games have received enhanced updates to take advantage of the mid-generation refresh. Some titles, like Cyberpunk 2077, initially relied on the console’s hardware to improve performance. However, the game is now getting a dedicated update that will fully utilize the new technology.

Cyberpunk 2077 is receiving a PS5 Pro Enhanced Update Along with the Upgraded PSSR

A recent post from the official Cyberpunk 2077 X account (formerly Twitter) announces that a PS5 Pro update for the game is expected in the “not-too-distant future,” with additional details to be shared in the coming weeks. The developers have clarified that this update will not introduce any new in-game content; rather, it is designed to take advantage of the enhanced hardware capabilities of the PS5 Pro.

Sony has announced a list of games that will soon take advantage of the upgraded PSSR for the PS5 Pro. Most of these titles will receive the update on March 17, 2026. However, some games, such as Assassin’s Creed: Shadows and Cyberpunk 2077, will benefit from the new technology in the coming weeks. It’s possible that the PS5 Pro Enhanced update for Cyberpunk 2077 will be available when the developers are ready to implement the upgraded PSSR.

In other news, CD Projekt Red has stated that they have “no plans” to make new DLCs or expansions for Cyberpunk 2077. Additionally, Epic Games has teased another Cyberpunk 2077 x Fortnite collaboration on social media. What are your thoughts on Cyberpunk 2077 finally receiving a PS5 Pro Enhanced update? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about how data from Pokémon GO players will be used to help robots make precise deliveries. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: EMEA Masters Winter 2026 Playoffs Draw Confirmed
item.content:encoded:
While elite teams compete at First Stand, EMEA Masters Winter 2026 is deciding the best two-tier teams in the Europe, Middle East, and Africa region.

The League of Legends tournament has been blown open after shock defeats to G2 Nord eliminated Witchcraft, the spiritual successor to Los Ratones.

This year’s Winter event is even more important, as the top two teams will qualify for the Esports World Cup Qualifier and compete with LEC teams for a chance to play internationally at the lucrative EWC event in Saudi Arabia later this year.

As Academy teams can’t participate in the Esports World Cup, two of French Flair, Misa Esports, Eintracht Spandau, Gallions, Berlin International Gaming, Solary, and Unicorns of Love Sexy Edition will earn a spot in the qualifier tournament.

EMEA Masters Winter Playoffs Draw

Following the Champions Round, Misa Esports, Movistar KOI Fénix, Solary, and Verdant earned a bye into the second round of the Playoffs.

They will await the winners of the upcoming best-of-three series with the following draw:

  • G2 Nord vs French Flair – Winner faces Misa Esports
  • Eintracht Spandau vs Gallions – Winner faces Movistar KOI Fénix
  • Berlin International Gaming vs Karmine Corp Blue – Winner faces Solary
  • Team Heretics Academy vs Unicorns Of Love Sexy Edition – Winner faces Verdant

All four teams from both France’s LFL and Germany-based Prime League have qualified for the Playoffs

EMEA Masters Winter has a double elimination bracket, meaning teams will drop into the lower bracket after their first loss and will be eliminated from the event following a second defeat.

The playoffs, which begin March 23, will be best-of-threes until the semi-finals and final, which will be best-of-fives.

Following some upsets, the tournament is anyone’s to win. Who do you think will be crowned EMEA Masters Winter champions? Share your predictions on the Insider Gaming Discord.

It’s going to be an interesting season, Rekkles has announced he isn’t retiring from LoL despite Witchcraft’s elimination.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/emea-masters-winter-2026-playoffs-draw-confirmed/

item.title: Crimson Desert, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, and More Added to Upgraded PSSR List
item.content:encoded:
Crimson Desert, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, and several others will be able to utilise PS5 Pro’s upgraded PSSR.

Sony revealed they are rolling out an upgraded version of the PS5 Pro’s upscaling tech, PSSR (PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution), soon, with Resident Evil Requiem being the first game to use it. Then they added Control and Alan Wake 2 to the list, and now more games have made it to the list.

Full List of Games That Will Use PS5 Pro’s Upgraded PSSR

A new PlayStation blog post reveals that several games, including Crimson Desert, will soon be able to use the PS5 Pro’s upgraded PSSR. Several of their partners, including Konami Digital Entertainment, Electronic Arts, Remedy Entertainment, Ninja Theory, Square Enix, Koei Tecmo Games, Capcom, and more. Check out the full list of all the games that will be using upgraded PSSR in the near future below:

  • Silent Hill 2
  • Silent Hill f
  • Dragon Age: The Veilguard
  • Control
  • Alan Wake 2
  • Senua’s Saga: Hellblade 2
  • Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth
  • Nioh 3
  • Rise of the Ronin
  • Monster Hunter Wilds
  • Dragon’s Dogma 2
  • Crimson Desert
  • Cyberpunk 2077
  • Assassin’s Creed Shadows

Most of the games will receive the upgraded PSSR via a PS5 system software update that will roll out in phases starting March 16 at 10:00 PM Pacific Time and will gradually become available to all users. Crimson Desert will get it at launch on March 19, and games like Assassin’s Creed Shadows and Cyberpunk 2077 will get it in the coming weeks.

In other news, check out the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog and Classics Catalog titles for March 2026. Additionally, a leak claims that the PlayStation 1 LEGO set will be arriving this year. What are your thoughts on games like Crimson Desert, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, and more receiving the upgraded PSSR? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Doom: the Dark Ages Denuvo being cracked by pirates. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Death Stranding 2 PC Release Date Countdown & Exact Start Times
item.content:encoded:
It’s no secret that a PC port of Death Stranding 2 was on the cards, broadening the sequel’s platforms. It could prove to be one of the last PS5 exclusives going to another platform, so find out its release date and when you can start playing it.

Death Stranding 2 was the long-awaited sequel to Hideo Kojima‘s mindbending messenger title. It triumphed in many ways, and Sony had no qualms about adding the successor to its PlayStation-to-PC scheme. If you’ve been waiting for DS2 on PC, then it’s nearly time for PC to deliver.

When Is Death Stranding 2 PC Coming Out? Release Date, Explained

Death Stranding 2 finally launches for PC gamers on March 19.

‘What took you so long?’ That question is often thrown around in the Metal Gear Solid universe—even by Kojima himself—but it’s only a nine-month turnaround between the PS5 release and PC.

  • More Insider Gaming: Death Stranding 2 PC Specifications Revealed

It follows a similar time frame to the first game’s arrival on PC, and this could end up being one of the most significant PlayStation exclusives arriving on PC. A report arrived in March 2026 claiming that Sony was no longer releasing single-player PlayStation exclusives on PC.

Should this turn out to be accurate, Death Stranding 2 could very well end up being the last of its kind for PC owners. After this, it might be time to upgrade your console collection or start building one.

Death Stranding 2 PC Release Times

According to Steam, Death Stranding 2 is available from 2:30 PM UTC on March 19.

More specifically, SteamDB has this information for us. Using UTC, we can work out when and where Death Stranding 2 will be ready for you to purchase and play it.

  • More Insider Gaming: Death Stranding 2 PC Launches With ‘New Modes and Features’

Check out our detailed table below, and hopefully get the answers you’re looking for.

Don’t shoot the messenger that the port has taken so long! Will you be buying it and playing on PC? Head to the Insider Gaming Discord and let us know.

If you missed it, read the wild story about Kojima and Zampella almost creating a first-person Metal Gear Solid game.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/death-stranding-2-release-date-times/

item.title: Doom: The Dark Ages Denuvo Seemingly Cracked
item.content:encoded:
It seems that Doom: The Dark Ages is the first 2025 title that has had its Denuvo cracked by pirates.

Denuvo DRM has been a subject of constant debate in the gaming industry for a very long time. Recently, we were informed that Crimson Desert will launch with Denuvo Anti-Tamper, which was enough to send fans into a frenzy. However, it now seems that a recent version of this software has been cracked.

Pirates Manage to Bypass Doom: The Dark Ages Denuvo

Spotted by The Gamer, a recent post on the r/CrackWatch subreddit claims that Doom: The Dark Ages has been cracked. The user, voices38, shared three links: the first two are text and image versions of the NFO file, while the third link directs to the Steam store page for the game. The post indicates that the game was successfully cracked on March 13, 2026, and that the format was ISO. It notes that the protections were Denuvo and Steam DRM.

Additionally, the post includes installation instructions for users interested in using the crack. What’s more, the pirate has revealed that the game’s real size is 81GB and also teased the next game they are working on, cracking, stating, “The next one might surprise you.”

Denuvo Anti-Tamper is software created to prevent the piracy and cracking of video games. However, there are allegations that this software may negatively affect a game’s performance, leading to issues such as reduced FPS, stuttering, and other problems. Conversely, some users argue that it has no impact on gameplay.

In other news, iD Software could be considering a return to the Quake series. Additionally, Doom: The Dark Ages was the “biggest launch” in id Software’s history. What are your thoughts on Doom: The Dark Ages Denuvo being cracked? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about how data from Pokémon GO players will be used to help robots make precise deliveries. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/doom-the-dark-ages-denuvo-seemingly-cracked/

item.title: Rekkles Isn’t Retiring Despite Los Ratones and Witchcraft Ending
item.content:encoded:
Iconic League of Legends pro Martin ‘Rekkles’ Larsson has confirmed he is not planning on retiring from his LoL esports career just yet.

The 29-year-old is a four-time LEC champion and has stated that he plans to fight for a spot on a Tier 1 team next year, whether that’s as an ADC, support, or coach.

Following the end of Marc ‘Caedrel’ Lamont’s Los Ratones project, the roster continued as ‘Witchcraft’ in EMEA Masters Winter with the addition of Gabriël ‘Bwipo’ Rau.

However, Witchcraft was shockingly eliminated early from EMEA Masters Winter by G2 Nord, the academy of LEC champions G2 Esports, and now the Swede is without a team.

His LEC Versus campaign with Los Ratones was Rekkles’ first time competing in the EMEA league since 2023 and proved that he is still capable of competing at an elite level.

What Is Next For Rekkles?

Speaking on his Twitch stream, Rekkles revealed his plans for the remainder of the year.

The former Fnatic and G2 pro says his main focus is on the November transfer window in the offseason and he will use the rest of 2026 to prove that he deserves a spot on a team next year.

Rekkles plans on co-streaming international events like LoL First Stand and MSI with a “big picture League of Legends focus” to practice and showcase his coaching abilities.

Then, Rekkles will be bootcamping in South Korea for over a month, between May 4 and June 15, where he will be practising as both an ADC and support.

After a successful 11 years as an ADC, Rekkles roleswapped to the less-mechanically intense support role for the 2024 season with T1 Academy. Now, Rekkles is seemingly considering returning to his original role.

Rekkles says after spending the year grinding, he will go on vacation on August 3 and, from there, will reassess exactly what he wants heading into the offseason.

Does Rekkles still have what it takes to compete in the LEC? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord.

And look forward to the next LoL esports season as LoL Worlds 2027 dates have been revealed.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/rekkles-isnt-retiring-despite-los-ratones-and-witchcraft-ending/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Pokémon GO Data Will Help Autonomous Robots Make Deliveries
item.content:encoded:
A new report reveals that data collected from Pokémon GO players will be used to help robots make precise deliveries.

Pokémon GO is an augmented reality game developed and released by Niantic in 2016, and it was an undeniable success. It brought in millions of players across the globe, all scouring through the streets in the hope of catching ’em all. This process has now enabled the company to collect data that has improved its GPS tech tremendously.

Niantic Spatial Has Been Building a Visual Positioning System from Pokémon GO Players’ Data

According to a report by MIT Technology Review (via GamesRadar+), Niantic Spatial has been utilizing data from Pokémon GO to enhance its visual positioning system for the past few years. The new model has been trained on over a million locations worldwide and can accurately pinpoint a user’s location. The level of precision is exceptionally high; Niantic Spatial CEO John Hanke stated that it could achieve accuracy within several centimeters and can also determine the direction in which a user is looking.

The company’s short-term goal is to use this data to help autonomous robots from Coco Robotics deliver with higher accuracy across Europe and the United States. The new model has been trained on 30 billion images that were captured by Pokémon Go players. The CTO, Brian McClendon, has also spoken about long-term plans, stating, “We’re not there yet, but we want to be there. I’m very focused on trying to re-create the real world.”

In other news, here’s a guide on the Pokémon GO 30th anniversary Pressure Rising Special Research, and all the rewards. Additionally, Pokémon Pokopia sold over 2.2 million copies within the first four days. What are your thoughts on Pokémon GO data being used to help robots make deliveries? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Saudi Arabia’s Electronic Gaming Development Company acquiring a 5% stake in Capcom. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Life Is Strange: Reunion Release Date Countdown & Exact Start Times
item.content:encoded:
The Life Is Strange series dates all the way back to 2015, and now, over 10 years later, Max and Chloe’s story appears to be coming to an end with Life Is Strange: Reunion.

It’s been a journey full of ups and downs, but it’s undeniable that countless fans have resonated with the ever-evolving narrative. If you were there since the start, or a new fan looking for a heart-wrenching story, then make sure you don’t miss Life Is Strange: Reunion’s release date.

When Is Life Is Strange: Reunion Coming Out? Release Date, Explained

There’s not long left, as Life Is Strange: Reunion releases as a full game on March 26, 2026.

Unlike previous entries in the series, Life Is Strange: Reunion will not be episodically released, meaning you can experience the full adventure all at once.

  • More Insider Gaming: Pokémon TCG Chaos Rising: Release Date & Card List

It’s a bold choice, but undoubtedly a welcome one for die-hard fans who are desperate to know how the narrative unfolds. Depending on who you are, there’s often nothing worse than being left on a cliffhanger and waiting months to see it resolved, but thankfully, that won’t be the case here.

Life Is Strange: Reunion Release Times

According to SteamDB, Life Is Strange: Reunion will go live at 9 AM PT on the 26 March, 2026.

  • More Insider Gaming: Battlefield 6 Season 2 Nightfall Release Date

It’s great news for those on the West Coast, as you can book the day off and sink your teeth into what’s bound to be a gripping narrative full of choices to make. For the rest of you, though, here’s when Life Is Strange: Reunion will release across a variety of other time zones:

Are you excited to play Life Is Strange: Reunion? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more important release dates, check out when the Zenless Zone Zero Update 2.7 and Honkai Star Rail Update 4.1 come out.

MOBILE APP
